channel.title: Golang on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Golang on Arrans github.io

item.title: mattermost-community/focalboard
item.description: Focalboard is an open source, self-hosted alternative to Trello, Notion, and Asana.

item.title: tmc/langchaingo
item.description: LangChain for Go, the easiest way to write LLM-based programs in Go

item.title: rclone/rclone
item.description: “rsync for cloud storage” - Google Drive, S3, Dropbox, Backblaze B2, One Drive, Swift, Hubic, Wasabi, Google Cloud Storage, Azure Blob, Azure Files, Yandex Files

item.title: amir20/dozzle
item.description: Realtime log viewer for containers. Supports Docker, Swarm and K8s.

item.title: ollama/ollama
item.description: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.

item.title: gravitational/teleport
item.description: The easiest, and most secure way to access and protect all of your infrastructure.

item.title: AlexxIT/go2rtc
item.description: Ultimate camera streaming application

item.title: cloudreve/cloudreve
item.description: 🌩 Self-hosted file management and sharing system, supports multiple storage providers

item.title: mikefarah/yq
item.description: yq is a portable command-line YAML, JSON, XML, CSV, TOML, HCL and properties processor

item.title: mattermost/mattermost
item.description: Mattermost is an open source platform for secure collaboration across the entire software development lifecycle..

item.title: noborus/ov
item.description: 🎑Feature-rich terminal-based text viewer. It is a so-called terminal pager.

item.title: marcopiovanello/yt-dlp-web-ui
item.description: A terrible web ui and RPC server for yt-dlp. Designed to be self-hosted.

item.title: schollz/croc
item.description: Easily and securely send things from one computer to another 🐊 📦

item.title: metacall/core
item.description: MetaCall: The ultimate polyglot programming experience.

item.title: meshery/meshery
item.description: Meshery, the cloud native manager

item.title: go-vikunja/vikunja
item.description: The to-do app to organize your life.

item.title: charmbracelet/bubbletea
item.description: A powerful little TUI framework 🏗

item.title: rudrankriyam/App-Store-Connect-CLI
item.description: Fast, scriptable CLI for the App Store Connect API. Automate TestFlight, builds, submissions, signing, analytics, screenshots, subscriptions, and more. JSON-first, no interactive prompts

item.title: blackwell-systems/shelfctl
item.description: PDF/EPUB library CLI/TUI backed by GitHub Release assets (Git LFS alternative). On-demand per-file downloads, metadata catalog, migrate/split bloated repos.

item.title: moovweb/gvm
item.description: Go Version Manager

item.title: donetick/donetick
item.description: Donetick an open-source, user-friendly app for managing tasks and chores, featuring customizable options to help you and others stay organized

item.title: ente-io/ente
item.description: 💚 End-to-end encrypted cloud for everything.

item.title: jonradoff/lofp
item.description: Legends of Future Past, the classic commercial MUD form the 1990’s

item.title: goplus/spx
item.description: spx - A Scratch Compatible Go/XGo 2D Game Engine for STEM education

item.title: KaijuEngine/kaiju
item.description: General purpose 3D and 2D game engine using Go (golang) and Vulkan with built in editor

item.title: m1k1o/neko
item.description: A self hosted virtual browser that runs in docker and uses WebRTC.

item.title: gomuks/gomuks
item.description: A Matrix client written in Go.

item.title: burrowers/garble
item.description: Obfuscate Go builds

item.title: matrix-org/dendrite
item.description: Dendrite is a second-generation Matrix homeserver written in Go!

item.title: clidey/whodb
item.description: A lightweight next-gen data explorer - Postgres, MySQL, SQLite, MongoDB, Redis, MariaDB, Elastic Search, and Clickhouse with Chat interface

item.title: ayn2op/discordo
item.description: A lightweight, secure, and feature-rich Discord terminal (TUI) client.

item.title: GopeedLab/gopeed
item.description: A fast, modern download manager for HTTP, BitTorrent, Magnet, and ed2k. Cross-platform, built with Golang and Flutter.

item.title: gomlx/gomlx
item.description: GoMLX: An Accelerated Machine Learning Framework For Go

item.title: TwiN/gatus
item.description: Automated developer-oriented status page with alerting and incident support

item.title: Infisical/infisical
item.description: Infisical is the open-source platform for secrets, certificates, and privileged access management.

item.title: caarlos0/svu
item.description: semantic version utility

item.title: bluenviron/mediamtx
item.description: Ready-to-use SRT / WebRTC / RTSP / RTMP / LL-HLS / MPEG-TS / RTP media server and media proxy that allows to read, publish, proxy, record and playback video and audio streams.

item.title: imfing/hextra
item.description: 🔯 Modern, batteries-included Hugo theme for creating beautiful doc, blog and static websites

item.title: dlvhdr/gh-dash
item.description: A rich terminal UI for GitHub that doesn’t break your flow.

item.title: tmrts/go-patterns
item.description: Curated list of Go design patterns, recipes and idioms

item.title: arp242/goatcounter
item.description: Easy web analytics. No tracking of personal data.

item.title: riverqueue/river
item.description: Fast and reliable background jobs in Go

item.title: milvus-io/milvus
item.description: Milvus is a high-performance, cloud-native vector database built for scalable vector ANN search

item.title: dundee/gdu
item.description: Fast disk usage analyzer with console interface written in Go

item.title: F1bonacc1/process-compose
item.description: Process Compose is a simple and flexible scheduler and orchestrator to manage non-containerized applications.

item.title: dlvhdr/diffnav
item.description: A git diff pager based on delta but with a file tree, à la GitHub.

item.title: adrg/xdg
item.description: Go implementation of the XDG Base Directory Specification and XDG user directories

item.title: golang-migrate/migrate
item.description: Database migrations. CLI and Golang library.

item.title: rfjakob/gocryptfs
item.description: Encrypted overlay filesystem written in Go

item.title: steveiliop56/tinyauth
item.description: The tiniest authentication and authorization server you have ever seen.

item.title: gogf/gf
item.description: A powerful framework for faster, easier, and more efficient project development.

item.title: axllent/mailpit
item.description: An email and SMTP testing tool with API for developers

item.title: kubernetes-sigs/kind
item.description: Kubernetes IN Docker - local clusters for testing Kubernetes

item.title: jinzhu/now
item.description: Now is a time toolkit for golang

item.title: IceWhaleTech/CasaOS
item.description: CasaOS - A simple, easy-to-use, elegant open-source Personal Cloud system.

item.title: crazy-max/diun
item.description: Receive notifications when an image is updated on a Docker registry

item.title: warrant-dev/warrant
item.description: Warrant is a highly scalable, centralized authorization service based on Google Zanzibar. Use it to define, enforce, query, and audit application authorization and access control.

item.title: terrastruct/d2
item.description: D2 is a modern diagram scripting language that turns text to diagrams.

item.title: semaphoreio/semaphore
item.description: All-in-one delivery platform for AI-driven development.

item.title: juicedata/juicefs
item.description: JuiceFS is a distributed POSIX file system built on top of Redis and S3.

item.title: mk6i/open-oscar-server
item.description: Self-hostable instant messaging server compatible with classic AIM and ICQ clients written in golang. (Independently developed, not affiliated with or endorsed by AOL)

item.title: redis/rueidis
item.description: A fast Golang Redis client that supports Client Side Caching, Auto Pipelining, RDMA, etc.

item.title: fullstorydev/grpcurl
item.description: Like cURL, but for gRPC: Command-line tool for interacting with gRPC servers

item.title: spf13/cobra
item.description: A Commander for modern Go CLI interactions

item.title: sosedoff/pgweb
item.description: Cross-platform client for PostgreSQL databases

item.title: go-git/go-git
item.description: A highly extensible Git implementation in pure Go.

item.title: tinode/chat
item.description: Instant messaging platform. Backend in Go. Clients: Swift iOS, Java Android, JS webapp, scriptable command line; chatbots

item.title: caarlos0/env
item.description: A simple, zero-dependencies library to parse environment variables into structs

item.title: authelia/authelia
item.description: The Single Sign-On Multi-Factor portal for web apps, now OpenID Certified™

item.title: owlistic-notes/owlistic
item.description: 🦉 Free open-source notetaking app with real-time sync 🔄⚡️🚀

item.title: ThreeDotsLabs/watermill
item.description: Building event-driven applications the easy way in Go.

item.title: inbucket/inbucket
item.description: Disposable webmail server (similar to Mailinator) with built in SMTP, POP3, RESTful servers; no DB required.

item.title: mautrix/go
item.description: A Golang Matrix framework.

item.title: Ebazhanov/linkedin-skill-assessments-quizzes
item.description: Full reference of LinkedIn answers 2024 for skill assessments (aws-lambda, rest-api, javascript, react, git, html, jquery, mongodb, java, Go, python, machine-learning, power-point) linkedin excel test lösungen, linkedin machine learning test LinkedIn test questions and answers

item.title: yorukot/superfile
item.description: Pretty fancy and modern terminal file manager

item.title: pterm/pterm
item.description: ✨ PTerm is a modern Go module to easily beautify console output. Featuring charts, progressbars, tables, trees, text input, select menus and much more 🚀 It’s completely configurable and 100% cross-platform compatible.

item.title: Zouuup/landrun
item.description: Run any Linux process in a secure, unprivileged sandbox using Landlock. Think firejail, but lightweight, user-friendly, and baked into the kernel.

item.title: go-flutter-desktop/go-flutter
item.description: Flutter on Windows, MacOS and Linux - based on Flutter Embedding, Go and GLFW.

item.title: quic-go/quic-go
item.description: A production-ready QUIC implementation in pure Go

item.title: metaspartan/mactop
item.description: mactop - Apple Silicon Monitor Top

item.title: sashabaranov/go-openai
item.description: OpenAI ChatGPT, GPT-5, GPT-Image-1, Whisper API clients for Go

item.title: klauspost/compress
item.description: Optimized Go Compression Packages

item.title: ritz078/transform
item.description: A polyglot web converter.

item.title: pingcap/talent-plan
item.description: open source training courses about distributed database and distributed systems

item.title: knadh/koanf
item.description: Simple, extremely lightweight, extensible, configuration management library for Go. Supports JSON, TOML, YAML, env, command line, file, S3 etc. Alternative to viper.

item.title: Forceu/Gokapi
item.description: Lightweight selfhosted Firefox Send alternative without public upload. AWS S3 supported.

item.title: openziti/ziti
item.description: The parent project for OpenZiti. Here you will find the executables for a fully zero-trust, programmable network @OpenZiti

item.title: fatih/color
item.description: Color package for Go (golang)

item.title: wneessen/go-mail
item.description: 📧 Easy to use, yet comprehensive library for sending mails with Go

item.title: johnfercher/maroto
item.description: A maroto way to create PDFs. Maroto is inspired in Bootstrap and uses gofpdf. Fast and simple.

item.title: dutchcoders/transfer.sh
item.description: Easy and fast file sharing from the command-line.

item.title: openziti/zrok
item.description: Secure internet sharing made simple.

item.title: Adembc/lazyssh
item.description: A terminal-based SSH manager inspired by lazydocker and k9s - Written in go

item.title: go-sprout/sprout
item.description: From sprig to sprout - Useful template functions for Go templates with steroids

item.title: ebitengine/purego
item.description: A library for calling C functions from Go without Cgo

item.title: ahmedakef/gotutor
item.description: Online Go Debugger & Visualizer

item.title: go-shiori/shiori
item.description: Simple bookmark manager built with Go

item.title: JohannesKaufmann/html-to-markdown
item.description: ⚙️ Convert HTML to Markdown. Even works with entire websites and can be extended through rules.

item.title: ondrajz/go-callvis
item.description: Visualize call graph of a Go program using Graphviz

item.title: gliderlabs/ssh
item.description: Easy SSH servers in Golang
